name: Generate Random Value
short_description: Generates a random float value uniformly distributed between a specified lower and upper bound, rounded to two decimal places. This function is typically used to create randomized inputs for other financial models.

inputs.name: low
inputs.description: The inclusive lower bound of the random value range.

inputs.name: high
inputs.description: The inclusive upper bound of the random value range.

name: Compliance Penalty for Over-Limit Exposure
short_description: Calculates the financial penalty incurred when a company's risk exposure exceeds a predefined regulatory threshold.

inputs.name: penalty_rate
inputs.description: Percentage rate applied to the excess exposure (e.g., 5 for 5%)

name: Regulatory Capital Shortfall
short_description: Calculates the capital shortfall for a firm against a regulatory minimum requirement.

inputs.name: current_capital
inputs.description: The current capital held by the firm.

inputs.name: min_requirement
inputs.description: The minimum capital required by regulators.

name: Capital Requirement Evaluation
short_description: Calculates the capital deficiency by comparing an entity's current capital against the minimum regulatory requirement.

inputs.name: min_requirement
inputs.description: The minimum capital required by the regulator.

name: Liquidity Gap Calculation
short_description: Calculates the liquidity gap by comparing liquid assets to the liquidity requirement for regulatory compliance.

inputs.name: liquid_assets
inputs.description: Value of liquid assets held by the financial institution.

inputs.name: liquidity_requirement
inputs.description: Total liquidity required by regulations or internal policy.

name: Multi-Factor Regulatory Compliance Assessment
short_description: Advanced: Multi-factor Regulatory Compliance Assessment. Calculates total regulatory penalty based on compliance, capital, and liquidity factors.

inputs.name: threshold
inputs.description: The regulatory threshold for risk exposure

inputs.name: penalty_rate
inputs.description: The penalty rate as a percentage for exceeding the compliance threshold

inputs.name: min_capital
inputs.description: The minimum capital required by regulators

inputs.name: liquidity_requirement
inputs.description: The minimum liquid assets required by regulators
